zh.Stokes, Suffolk, , England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可斯托克 白 易普斯維其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Maude Geslingham於1344年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾可迪可特時，她的父親John Gistringham Geslingham24歲，母親Maude Gardeville22歲。她和Sir Thomas Poley Lord of Boxted至少有5個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1383年在英國賀特福爾可迪可特享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾可迪可特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maude Geslingham于1344年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾可迪可特时，她的父亲John Gistringham Geslingham24岁，母亲Maude Gardeville22岁。她和Sir Thomas Poley Lord of Boxted至少有5个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1383年在英国賀特福爾可迪可特享年39岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾可迪可特。

meanings: Variant of   Maud  , the usual spelling of the name in North America.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Maude Geslingham was born in 1344, in Codicote, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Gistringham Geslingham, was 24 and her mother, Maude Gardeville, was 22. She had at least 5 sons and 5 daughters with Sir Thomas Poley Lord of Boxted. She died in 1383, in Codicote, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Codicote, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Stokes, Suffolk, , England: Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maude Geslingham est née en 1344, à Codicote, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Gistringham Geslingham, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Maude Gardeville, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles avec Sir Thomas Poley Lord of Boxted. Elle est décédée en 1383, à Codicote, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Codicote, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Stokes, Suffolk, , England: Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Maude Geslingham 1344 in Codicote, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Gistringham Geslingham 24 und ihre Mutter Maude Gardeville 22. Sie hatte mit Sir Thomas Poley Lord of Boxted mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1383 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Codicote, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Codicote, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maude Geslingham è nata il nel 1344 nel Codicote, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Gistringham Geslingham, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Maude Gardeville, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie con Sir Thomas Poley Lord of Boxted. Morì nel 1383, nel Codicote, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Codicote, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Maude Geslinghamが1344年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアコディコトで生まれた時，父John Gistringham Geslinghamは24歳，母Maude Gardevilleは22歳であった。彼女はSir Thomas Poley Lord of Boxtedとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1383年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアコディコトで39歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアコディコトにて埋葬された。

ko.Stokes, Suffolk, , England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 이프스위치
ko.lifeSummary: Maude Geslingham(이)가 1344년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 코딕트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Gistringham Geslingham(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maude Gardeville(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Sir Thomas Poley Lord of Boxted(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1383년 영국 허트퍼드실르 코딕트에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 코딕트에 묻혔다.

Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas com Sir Thomas Poley Lord of Boxted. ru.Stokes, Suffolk, , England: сток би ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maude Geslingham родилась в 1344 г. в местности кодикот, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Gistringham Geslingham было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Maude Gardeville, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Sir Thomas Poley Lord of Boxted. Она умерла в 1383 г. в местности кодикот, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности кодикот, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas con Sir Thomas Poley Lord of Boxted.
